subcodes.first_line: O thou who art homeless and destitute in the path of God! Every nest and shelter, every house and dwelling that is laid waste in His path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بی سر و سامان سبیل الهی هر لانه و آشیانه و خانه و کاشانه که در راه حق خراب
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @early years; early ministry of Baha'u'llah
